## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run ci`
- [ ] Added or updated tests/regression coverage
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior or workflow changed

## Upgrade Safety Impact

- [ ] No impact to upgrade decisions
- [ ] Changes container rehearsal behavior
- [ ] Changes baseline/post-upgrade comparison behavior
- [ ] Changes guarded update or rollback behavior

## Notes

Mention any fixture/report limitations, known false positives, or follow-up work.
